label: Lantern Bunkroom
description: Lantern Bunkroom forms a narrow, cell-like chamber set behind the tavern’s low-vaulted ferrocrete ribs, its surfaces sealed with utilitarian paint and edged with blast-rated trim. Two tiers of bolted bunks line the long walls, their frames chained to the deck and separated by clipped lockers designed for rapid inspection. Hooded lumen strips cast a regulated, pallid light that never reaches full warmth, while vent grilles and exposed auspex conduit carry the enclave’s constant hum through the room. A pressure door with layered gasket seals and stenciled blackout markings affirms its function as secured lodging within siege discipline.
